feed.description: Solo, long-form reflections on biohacking: the state of the field in 2025, what actually works, and the ethics and limits of human optimization.
feed.title: The Long View: Biohacking

bullets: In this episode, I’m going to build a grounded map: what’s real, what’s uncertain, and what you can do without turning your life into an optimization project.
Alex Morgan: Where the field is right now.
Alex Morgan: The second step is to separate interventions that improve fundamentals from interventions that just create the feeling of progress.

summary.title: The Long View: Biohacking — Episode 3 — synthetic
